title: Service Password
summary: The service password for installation, trial run, and maintenance is 9999 and cannot be changed.
evidence_quote: 服务密码为“9999” 。(不可切换)

title: Administrator Password Default
summary: The default administrator password is 0000 and can be changed.
evidence_quote: 管理员初始密码为 0000。可以切换密码。

title: Remote Controller Sensor Correction Range
summary: The remote controller sensor temperature can be corrected within -3 to +3.
evidence_quote: 在-3～+3范围内进行设定。

title: Heating Room Temperature Correction Range
summary: Heating room temperature correction range is 0 to +3°C.
evidence_quote: 可以在O～ +3°C范围进行修正。

title: Return Air Temperature Correction Range
summary: Return air temperature correction range is -2°C to 2°C.
evidence_quote: 在-2°C～2°C范围内进行修正。

title: Cooling Outdoor Temperature Range for Auto Mode
summary: Cooling outdoor temperature setting range is 10 to 30°C.
evidence_quote: 冷房室外温度 ： 在10～30 °C范围内进行设定。

title: Heating Outdoor Temperature Range for Auto Mode
summary: Heating outdoor temperature setting range is 10 to 22°C.
evidence_quote: 暖房室外温度 ： 在10～22 °C范围内进行设定。

title: Cooling Indoor Temperature Range for Auto Mode
summary: Cooling indoor temperature setting range is 18 to 30°C.
evidence_quote: 冷房室内温度 ：在18～30 °C范围进行设定。

title: Heating Indoor Temperature Range for Auto Mode
summary: Heating indoor temperature setting range is 10 to 30°C.
evidence_quote: 暖房室内温度 ： 在10～30 °C范围内进行设定。

title: Cooling Correction Value for Outdoor Temperature Control
summary: Cooling correction value range is 0 to 10°C.
evidence_quote: 冷房修正值在0～10 °C下进行设定。

title: Heating Correction Value for Outdoor Temperature Control
summary: Heating correction value range is 0 to 5°C.
evidence_quote: 暖房修正值在0～5 °C范围内设定。

title: Capacity Backup Temperature Difference Range
summary: Temperature difference for starting 2-unit operation in capacity backup function is 2 to 5°C.
evidence_quote: 设定范围 ： 2～5 °C

title: Filter Signal Timer Settings
summary: Filter signal timer can be set to 180h, 600h, 1000h, or not displayed.
evidence_quote: 设定1 180时间 设定2 600时间 设定3 1,000时间 设定4 1,000时间

title: Cooling Fan Delay Timer Options
summary: Cooling fan delay timer options: 0.5h, 2h, 6h.
evidence_quote: 设定1： 0.5时间 设定2： 2时间 设定3： 6时间

title: Heating Fan Delay Timer Options
summary: Heating fan delay timer options: 0.5h, 2h, 6h.
evidence_quote: 设定1： 0.5时间 设定2： 2时间 设定3： 6时间

title: Auto Mode Switching Temperature Range
summary: Cooling/heating switching temperature can be set from 1 to 4°C.
evidence_quote: 可设定在1～4℃范围内进行温度转换。

title: Wired Remote Controller Cable Specifications
summary: Cable specifications for distances over 100m: up to 200m use 0.5mm², up to 300m use 0.75mm², up to 400m use 1.25mm², up to 600m use 2.0mm².

title: Maximum Number of Remote Controllers per Indoor Unit
summary: Up to 2 remote controllers can be connected to one indoor unit or group.
evidence_quote: 1台室内机或 1组室内机最多可连接 2个线控器。

title: Drain Pump Operation Modes
summary: Drain pump operation modes: Normal (cooling/dry), Heating interlock, Heating/fan interlock, Fan interlock.
evidence_quote: 通常 ： 冷房，除湿时运转 制暖时联动 ： 通常+暖房时运转 制暖/送风时联动 ： 所有运转模式时运转 送风时联动 ： 通常+送风时运转

title: Fan Speed Auto Switching Modes
summary: Auto fan speed modes: Auto1 (High-Med-Low), Auto2 (Super High-High-Med-Low).
evidence_quote: 自动1： 高⇒中⇒低 范围内切换风档。 自动2： 超高⇒高⇒中⇒低 范围内切换风档。
